from pathlib import Path
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker

from app.db import AssetKind, AssetStatus, AudioJob, Base, JobStatus, StorySession, make_engine
from app.db.base import utc_now
from app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.sessions import SessionService
from app.db.models import SessionAsset

DB_URL = 'sqlite+pysqlite:////Users/kevin/code/storyteller/.artifacts/webapp-qa/prompt77.db'
Path('/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/.artifacts/webapp-qa').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
engine = make_engine(DB_URL)
Base.metadata.drop_all(engine)
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, expire_on_commit=False)

with SessionLocal() as session:
    service = SessionService(session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title='QA Final Audio Assembly')
    for stage in (
        WorkflowStage.GENRE,
        WorkflowStage.TONE,
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
        WorkflowStage.BEATS,
        WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
        WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
    ):
        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=stage,
            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            detail=f'Completed {stage.value}.',
        )
    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.AUDIO,
        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        detail='Rendering replacement narration while the prior master stays available.',
    )
    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.FINALIZE,
        status=WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION,
        detail='Waiting for the replacement narration master.',
    )

    story_session = session.get(StorySession, snapshot.id)
    assert story_session is not None
    story_session.audio_voice_key = 'hearthside'
    story_session.audio_narration_style = 'warm'
    story_session.audio_playback_speed = 0.9
    story_session.audio_include_background_music = False
    story_session.audio_music_profile = 'lullaby_piano'
    story_session.audio_narration_volume = 88
    story_session.audio_music_volume = 18

    prior_job = AudioJob(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        status=JobStatus.COMPLETED,
        voice_key='moonbeam',
        playback_speed=0.95,
        include_background_music=False,
        music_profile='lullaby_piano',
        completed_at=utc_now(),
        config_json={
            'progress_percent': 100.0,
            'current_step': 'Narration finished and the final audio asset is ready.',
            'latest_asset_kind': AssetKind.FINAL_AUDIO.value,
        },
    )
    active_job = AudioJob(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        status=JobStatus.IN_PROGRESS,
        voice_key='hearthside',
        playback_speed=0.9,
        include_background_music=False,
        music_profile='lullaby_piano',
        estimated_duration_seconds=780,
        current_segment_index=2,
        config_json={
            'progress_percent': 68.0,
            'current_step': 'Rendering narration segment 2 of 3.',
            'current_step_index': 2,
            'total_steps': 6,
            'completed_segments': 1,
            'total_segments': 3,
            'latest_asset_kind': AssetKind.AUDIO_SEGMENT.value,
        },
    )
    session.add_all([prior_job, active_job])
    session.flush()

    prior_asset = SessionAsset(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        audio_job_id=prior_job.id,
        asset_kind=AssetKind.FINAL_AUDIO,
        status=AssetStatus.READY,
        storage_bucket='storyteller-audio',
        object_path=f'sessions/{snapshot.id}/audio/jobs/{prior_job.id}/final/story.wav',
        mime_type='audio/wav',
        byte_size=2048,
        metadata_json={
            'duration_seconds': 812.0,
            'generation': {'voice_key': 'moonbeam'},
            'mix': {'applied': False},
        },
        ready_at=utc_now(),
    )
    session.add(prior_asset)
    session.commit()
    print(snapshot.id)
PY"
